title: ADEPTNA Beautiful Rattan Effect Hanging Planter – 26cm (10") Hanging Basket | Decorative Plant Pot for Home, Garden & Patio | Stylish Flower Bowl for Indoor & Outdoor Use (BROWN)
features: 𝐒𝐓𝐘𝐋𝐈𝐒𝐇 𝐑𝐀𝐓𝐓𝐀𝐍 𝐄𝐅𝐅𝐄𝐂𝐓 𝐃𝐄𝐒𝐈𝐆𝐍 – Add a touch of elegance to your garden, balcony, or patio with this beautiful rattan effect hanging planter, perfect for showcasing vibrant flowers and greenery.
𝐃𝐔𝐑𝐀𝐁𝐋𝐄 & 𝐖𝐄𝐀𝐓𝐇𝐄𝐑-𝐑𝐄𝐒𝐈𝐒𝐓𝐀𝐍𝐓 – Made from high-quality plastic with a woven-style finish, this planter is lightweight, sturdy, and designed to withstand outdoor conditions all year round.
𝐂𝐎𝐍𝐕𝐄𝐍𝐈𝐄𝐍𝐓 𝐇𝐀𝐍𝐆𝐈𝐍𝐆 𝐒𝐘𝐒𝐓𝐄𝐌 – Features three strong black metal chains and a secure hanging hook, ensuring easy installation and stable suspension in any outdoor space.
𝐏𝐑𝐀𝐂𝐓𝐈𝐂𝐀𝐋 𝐃𝐑𝐀𝐈𝐍𝐀𝐆𝐄 𝐏𝐋𝐔𝐆 – Designed with a removable drainage plug at the base to prevent waterlogging and promote healthy plant growth.
𝐏𝐄𝐑𝐅𝐄𝐂𝐓 𝐒𝐈𝐙𝐄 𝐅𝐎𝐑 𝐕𝐀𝐑𝐈𝐎𝐔𝐒 𝐏𝐋𝐀𝐍𝐓𝐒 – Measuring 26cm (10") in diameter with a total height of 15.5cm and 43cm long chains, this hanging basket is ideal for flowers, trailing plants, or herbs.
description: ADEPTNA Beautiful Rattan Effect Hanging Planter – 26cm (10") Hanging Basket | Decorative Plant Pot for Home, Garden & Patio | Stylish Flower Bowl for Indoor & Outdoor Use STYLISH RATTAN EFFECT DESIGN – Add a touch of elegance to your garden, balcony, or patio with this beautiful rattan effect hanging planter, perfect for showcasing vibrant flowers and greenery. DURABLE & WEATHER-RESISTANT – Made from high-quality plastic with a woven-style finish, this planter is lightweight, sturdy, and designed to withstand outdoor conditions all year round. CONVENIENT HANGING SYSTEM – Features three strong black metal chains and a secure hanging hook, ensuring easy installation and stable suspension in any outdoor space. PRACTICAL DRAINAGE PLUG – Designed with a removable drainage plug at the base to prevent waterlogging and promote healthy plant growth. PERFECT SIZE FOR VARIOUS PLANTS – Measuring 26cm (10") in diameter with a total height of 15.5cm and 43cm long chains, this hanging basket is ideal for flowers, trailing plants, or herbs.
